body:
## What & why

This reconciles the founder "close it tonight" runbook against the **actual** repo
state and adds the three genuinely-missing, doctrine-aligned artifacts that
**complement** the existing launch work rather than duplicate it.

Reconnaissance found that most of the runbook already exists or is founder-only:
- **PR #650** already greens the doctrine/governance CI gates (via *compliant-context
  allowlisting — no guard weakened*), migrates landing refs to the canonical
  `/health` + `/health/deep`, and adds an honest readiness evidence doc.
- **PR #638** already adds the Claude Code workflow + `CLAUDE.md`.
- The repo already has go-live gates, prospect trackers, the service catalog, the
  no-overclaim register, and ~120 ops runbooks.
- **#641–#649** are ~9 overlapping draft launch branches (PR #650 itself flags this).

So this PR adds only what was missing — the **decision layer**, a **convenience
gate-runner**, and a **doctrine-aligned private-launch offer**.

## Files

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `docs/ops/OFFICIAL_PRIVATE_LAUNCH_DECISION.md` | The GO/NO-GO decision layer: private launch **conditional GO**, public launch **NO-GO** until paid proof. Recommended single merge path (`#638 → #650`, then triage/close `#641–#649`). Surfaces the **P0 Free-Diagnostic money-safety decision** (`0 SAR` vs. the "no plan charges 0 halalas" invariant). Lists founder-only blockers and the gate evidence measured this session. |
| `scripts/dealix_close_now.sh` | Read-only close-now gate runner + founder orientation. **Never deploys, charges, or sends.** `chmod +x`, `bash -n` clean. |
| `sales/COMMAND_SPRINT_OFFER.md` | Bilingual (AR+EN) private-launch offer mapped to the existing service catalog. Honors no-overclaim, approval-first, no cold WhatsApp, no scraping. Includes a **manual-only** outreach template. |

## Gate evidence measured this session (branch tip)

- `make env-check` → ✅ pass
- `make security-smoke` → ⚠️ red on this older tip (committed `.env.*.example` +
  secret-*prefix* patterns in test fixtures/docs); PR #650 reports it green on its
  head after compliant-context allowlisting.
- `/health`, `/health/deep` → ✅ exist (`api/routers/health.py`)
- `make api-contract-check`, `make alembic-heads` → ⛔ need app deps (`fastapi`/`alembic`)
  not installed in the ephemeral sandbox → **CI is authoritative**.

## Explicitly NOT done (founder-only / out of scope)

Merging PRs · pushing to `main` · adding GitHub Secrets · branch protection ·
environments · Railway deploy · Moyasar live cutover · any external outreach.
These are enumerated as a checklist in the decision doc.

> Estimated value is not Verified value / القيمة التقديرية ليست قيمة مُتحقَّقة.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MjtptM2xbf83rK45KqL9ai

---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_01MjtptM2xbf83rK45KqL9ai)_

commits.messageBody:
…and Sprint offer

Reconcile the founder "close it tonight" runbook against the actual repo state
and add the three genuinely-missing, doctrine-aligned artifacts that complement
PR #650 (readiness evidence) and PR #638 (Claude Code + CLAUDE.md) without
duplicating existing assets.

- docs/ops/OFFICIAL_PRIVATE_LAUNCH_DECISION.md: the decision/verdict layer —
  conditional GO for private launch, NO-GO for public launch until paid proof;
  recommended single merge path (#638 -> #650, then triage/close #641-#649);
  the P0 Free-Diagnostic money-safety decision; founder-only blockers; and the
  gate evidence measured this session (env-check green; security-smoke red on
  the older tip; api-contract-check/alembic-heads need CI).
- scripts/dealix_close_now.sh: read-only close-now gate runner + founder
  orientation. Never deploys, charges, or sends.
- sales/COMMAND_SPRINT_OFFER.md: bilingual private-launch offer mapped to the
  existing service catalog; honors no-overclaim, approval-first, no cold
  WhatsApp, no scraping; manual-only outreach template.

Did NOT (founder-only / out of scope): merge PRs, push to main, add secrets,
set branch protection, create environments, deploy, flip Moyasar live, or send
any outreach.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MjtptM2xbf83rK45KqL9ai

commits.messageBody:
…existing and fixed by #638

The Trivy filesystem scan (broken aquasecurity/trivy-action@0.24.0 pin) and
Gitleaks secret scan (gitleaks-action@v2 org-license requirement) fail repo-wide,
not because of this PR's docs. PR #638 already fixes both in
.github/workflows/repository-hardening.yml (Trivy -> @master + skip-files;
gitleaks -> continue-on-error + license env). Record the conclusion so #651 needs
no workflow change.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MjtptM2xbf83rK45KqL9ai
